TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == sadingsya sa nau tuluay ku bihel ku nisakaput a kazizeng, tulu ku sapisaungay u tademaw, simal, dinngki. sadingsya i Cowng-kow-talu nu tung-nan-ya a niyazu' u hina maazihay tu, u angangan sa u sapitupin tu tuud, maazih tu I tukuy, nika maedes dku pikuwan . nipasasizuma ť°ěŚěčÁĶĄśąź sadingsya ayaw iza ku cacay a bihel zikuz tusa ku bihel, Delta hank u ngangan, ayaw tusa ku bihel cacay i zikuz, mabelihah sadingsya han, taw-ci-low anca pacainul han, kasakawanan kawili tusa ku bihel tapiingan cacay ku bihelan, pangangan han tu tapiingan kazizeng anca tapiingan sidingsya, u masisilay ku bihel. hina maazihan i Cow-kow nu mitupinay a sidingsya angangan u tangah nu kazizeng atu uzip nu kazizeng anipapulungan. tangah nu kazizeng pasu sapikuwan tu paysayzaan aikecan nu lima atu, sapi buliki tu kazizeng atu cacay aenengan,uzipi nu kazizeng taneng sapitupin tu tademaw anca u tuud, hina maazihay mitadu tu cacay a sapad atu mukin anisakaputan u sapitupin tu tuudan, hakay nu mukinay anisanga' tu zuku. uni paukak cinizaan, tanengtek ku lineng nu sidingsya, nika auni paukak dada' cinizaan caay kakalamkam ku culil. hamin nu nipaukak tu sidingsya panuayawen ku tadema, i zikuz ku pipazengan, nika iza ku i nuayawenanay a sapazeng nu kazizeng, zikuzan ku tademaw nuayawan mitupinay nu sidingsya. Sidingsya izaw ku nu tademaway anicuzuh a sidingsya atu batikal a sindingsya a kasasizuma, i zuma a kakitizaan iza henay ku nu dingkiay a sindingsya, matikal atu dingkiay a sindingsya kalamkam ku culil, nika u kalihalawan tu. kanahatu i Cong-kow-talu a sindingsya angangan u sapiculu' tu tuud, nika tadenga' katuud ku kakelul saanay misumad tu sindingsya zikuz palabasuentu, katuud i tuse nu talu i 21 se-ci misulul tu basu tengtenganay a sindingsya a mapulung misiwbay tu sapitupin, Pye-cin a kamu pangangan han tu "sin-pung-ce", nika maymaw malilid ku hekal nu tukay"papisatezepen tu. uyza sa mayasuy ku aca nu pikacaw tu sindinngsya, saaca caluway, kyu iza henay ku zuma a tademaw mipili' u sindingsya tu ku saculilan, namahiza, katuud ku pasindingsiyaan lalid sa mitupin tu labang. nika, uzumaa a kakitizaan, sindingsya mahang tup ala micidekay tu mitupim tu tademaw a saculilan, patinaku Pey-cin bu-tungay a piidangan nu micukaymasay tu sindingsya, zuma a kitizaan, mahiniay Kay-bung, Ci-bu,Saw-sin misulul tu basu sindingsya mapulung misuwbay. Taywanay a sindingsya u sapitupin tu tuud. natusaay a bihel a batikal sumad han, u mapelkihay tu dada' ku micukaymasay tu sindingsya. Kahulaman tu 104 a mihcaan tu zikuz pabinawlan micukaymas tu sindingsya, zazanan iza ku nuayawan tusa ku bihel zikuz cacay ku bihel katukuh sindingsya satu. bu-tung a likisi atu ayzaay a Pye-ci maleced mabaat tu, ayzaay a Pye0-cin malumayay a tukuy u Yen-ta a tukuy u saayaway a nipatizengan, Yen-ta a tukuy pulung iza ku 11 ku panan nu tukay, labu nu tukay a panan tabakiay a zazan pala u sazazanan nu hamin nu tukay. a nngangan nu zazan macacayat malu satanayaay tu a kakitizaan a pienengan nu binawlan, aenangan a kitizaan iza ku laed a pasayzaan tu wali sati adidi'ay a zazan, uyni adidi'ay a zazan pangangan han tu bu-tung, itawya nikuepucan nu tabakiay a zazan u ahebal 24 ku culil "pakala tu 37.2 mi" adidi'ay a zazan u ahebal 12 ku cilil "pakal tu 18.6 mi" bu-tung u ahebal enem ku culil "pakala tu 9.3mi", bu-tung, adidi'ay a zazan atu tabakiay a zazan mala u mahedekay tu a Yen-ta nu tukay tu hamin nu zazan. Min-Pye-cin i Yen-ta tukay nu saayaway a nisanga' u miduducay tu wayway nu Yen-ta tukay, labu nu tukay pasu nu linnga aniatulan a bu-tung yadah ku bu-tung hatu nisupedan nu Yen-tay. nika nakay mikitay malingatu, sakay nipatizeng tu tukay balangbang satu ku kawaw, yadaah tahkal ku tikenih a zazan atu masazumaay a zazan, Min-ing-cung a zidayan malingatu nipatizeng tu hekal tikenih a zazan atu mangangiwy caay katatungusay a bu-tung sangaleb a katuudtu. likisiay a Pye-cin u katuud nu Bu-tung a singangan, "niyazu'ay a tademaw izaw ku singangnay a Bu-tung tulu a malebut enem, cayay kasinganganay a Bu-tung nu midademecay a sibanuhay a katalalan" nikamu. Yen "su-cin-ce" nisulitan tu yen izaw ku tulu a lasubu walu a bataan izaw ku sepat tusil ku lamal zazan, tusa a bataan izaw ku siwa tusil ku Bu-tung, hungtui a ziday ci Cang-cye "Cin-s-u-cen-zng a zazan Bu-tung-ci" a nisulitan i cudad, hungti Pye-cin pulung nu zazan atu syang pakala tu 1170 tusil, zuma kakelul han pangangan tu Bu-tung pakala tu 459 a tusil, kahulaman cu Cu-i-sin "Cin-s-bang-syang-ce-kaw" nipasilacan i cudadan tu Pye-cin zazan syang mahapinang tahkal ku ngangan nu Bu-tung, kahulaman a Pye-cin zaza syang Bu-tung izza ku 2076 tusil, zuama kakelu han pangangan tu Bu-tungay iza, ku 978 tusil,, 1944 a mihcaan Zipun a taxdemaw ci Tow-tyan-cin-i i "Pye-cin ngangan a kitizaan ce" ku nisulitan, itawya Pye-cin pulung iza ku 3200 tusil ku Bu-tung, 1949 a mihcaan tahakal ku nipapulungan a niasipan Pye-cin a kitizaan izaway a ngangan nu zazan syang 6074 tusil, zumaay a Bu-tung 1330 tusil, zazan 274 tusil, syang 111 tusil, zazan 85 tusil, li 71 tusil, u kananaman u nisakamu nu tademaw amin Bu-tung, zazan syang, zazan li hamin han u Bu-tung. 1949 . malalitin tu i hekalay atu natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == sadiŇčsja sa nau tur~…ĺuaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ ku nisakaput a kaziz…ôŇč, tur~…ĺu ku sapisauŇčaj u tad…ômaw, simar~…ĺ, dinŇčki. sadiŇčsja i ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu nu tuŇč-nan-ja a nijazu Ē~ ° u ńßina maazińßaj tu, u aŇčaŇčan sa u sapitupin tu tuud, maazińß tu i tukuj, nika ma…ôd…ôs dku pikuwan . nipasasizuma **** sadiŇčsja ajaw iza ku ¶a ¶aj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ zikuz tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ, d…ôr~…ĺta ńßank u ŇčaŇčan, ajaw tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj i zikuz, mab…ôr~…ĺińßańß sadiŇčsja ńßan, taw- ¶i-r~…ĺow an ¶a pa ¶ainur~…ĺ ńßan, kasakawanan kawir~…ĺi tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ tapiiŇčan ¶a ¶aj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu tapiiŇčan kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a tapiiŇčan sidiŇčsja, u masisir~…ĺaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ. ńßina maazińßan i ¶ow-kow nu mitupinaj a sidiŇčsja aŇčaŇčan u taŇčańß nu kaziz…ôŇč atu uzip nu kaziz…ôŇč anipapur~…ĺuŇčan. taŇčańß nu kaziz…ôŇč pasu sapikuwan tu pajsajzaan aik…ô ¶an nu r~…ĺima atu, sapi bur~…ĺiki tu kaziz…ôŇč atu ¶a ¶aj a…ôn…ôŇčan,uzipi nu kaziz…ôŇč tan…ôŇč sapitupin tu tad…ômaw an ¶a u tuud, ńßina maazińßaj mitadu tu ¶a ¶aj a sapad atu mukin anisakaputan u sapitupin tu tuudan, ńßakaj nu mukinaj anisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zuku. uni paukak ¶inizaan, tan…ôŇčt…ôk ku r~…ĺin…ôŇč nu sidiŇčsja, nika auni paukak dada Ē~ ° ¶inizaan ¶aaj kakar~…ĺamkam ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ńßamin nu nipaukak tu sidiŇčsja panuajaw…ôn ku tad…ôma, i zikuz ku pipaz…ôŇčan, nika iza ku i nuajaw…ônanaj a sapaz…ôŇč nu kaziz…ôŇč, zikuzan ku tad…ômaw nuajawan mitupinaj nu sidiŇčsja. sidiŇčsja izaw ku nu tad…ômawaj ani ¶uzuńß a sidiŇčsja atu batikar~…ĺ a sindiŇčsja a kasasizuma, i zuma a kakitizaan iza ńß…ônaj ku nu diŇčkiaj a sindiŇčsja, matikar~…ĺ atu diŇčkiaj a sindiŇčsja kar~…ĺamkam ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, nika u kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺawan tu. kanańßatu i ¶oŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu a sindiŇčsja aŇčaŇčan u sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud, nika tad…ôŇča Ē~ ° katuud ku kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ saanaj misumad tu sindiŇčsja zikuz par~…ĺabasu…ôntu, katuud i tus…ô nu tar~…ĺu i ** s…ô- ¶i misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu basu t…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj a sindiŇčsja a mapur~…ĺuŇč misiwbaj tu sapitupin, pj…ô- ¶in a kamu paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "sin-puŇč- ¶…ô", nika majmaw mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tukaj"papisat…ôz…ôp…ôn tu. ujza sa majasuj ku a ¶a nu pika ¶aw tu sindinŇčsja, saa ¶a ¶ar~…ĺuwaj, kju iza ńß…ônaj ku zuma a tad…ômaw mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° u sindiŇčsja tu ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, namańßiza, katuud ku pasindiŇčsijaan r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč. nika, uzumaa a kakitizaan, sindiŇčsja mańßaŇč tup ar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj tu mitupim tu tad…ômaw a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, patinaku p…ô- ¶in bu-tuŇčaj a piidaŇčan nu mi ¶ukajmasaj tu sindiŇčsja, zuma a kitizaan, mańßiniaj kaj-buŇč, ¶i-bu,saw-sin misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu basu sindiŇčsja mapur~…ĺuŇč misuwbaj. tajwanaj a sindiŇčsja u sapitupin tu tuud. natusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ a batikar~…ĺ sumad ńßan, u map…ôr~…ĺkińßaj tu dada Ē~ ° ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu sindiŇčsja. kańßur~…ĺaman tu *** a mińß ¶aan tu zikuz pabinawr~…ĺan mi ¶ukajmas tu sindiŇčsja, zazanan iza ku nuajawan tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ zikuz ¶a ¶aj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ katukuńß sindiŇčsja satu. bu-tuŇč a r~…ĺikisi atu ajzaaj a pj…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôd mabaat tu, ajzaaj a pj…ô*- ¶in mar~…ĺumajaj a tukuj u j…ôn-ta a tukuj u saajawaj a nipatiz…ôŇčan, j…ôn-ta a tukuj pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku ** ku panan nu tukaj, r~…ĺabu nu tukaj a panan tabakiaj a zazan par~…ĺa u sazazanan nu ńßamin nu tukaj. a nŇčaŇčan nu zazan ma ¶a ¶ajat mar~…ĺu satanajaaj tu a kakitizaan a pi…ôn…ôŇčan nu binawr~…ĺan, a…ônaŇčan a kitizaan iza ku r~…ĺa…ôd a pasajzaan tu war~…ĺi sati adidi Ē~ °aj a zazan, ujni adidi Ē~ °aj a zazan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu bu-tuŇč, itawja niku…ôpu ¶an nu tabakiaj a zazan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ** ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ "pakar~…ĺa tu **.* mi" adidi Ē~ °aj a zazan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ** ku ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ "pakar~…ĺ tu **.* mi" bu-tuŇč u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ …ôn…ôm ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ "pakar~…ĺa tu *.*mi", bu-tuŇč, adidi Ē~ °aj a zazan atu tabakiaj a zazan mar~…ĺa u mańß…ôd…ôkaj tu a j…ôn-ta nu tukaj tu ńßamin nu zazan. min-pj…ô- ¶in i j…ôn-ta tukaj nu saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ ° u midudu ¶aj tu wajwaj nu j…ôn-ta tukaj, r~…ĺabu nu tukaj pasu nu r~…ĺinŇča aniatur~…ĺan a bu-tuŇč jadańß ku bu-tuŇč ńßatu nisup…ôdan nu j…ôn-taj. nika nakaj mikitaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, sakaj nipatiz…ôŇč tu tukaj bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč satu ku kawaw, jadaańß tańßkar~…ĺ ku tik…ônińß a zazan atu masazumaaj a zazan, min-iŇč- ¶uŇč a zidajan mar~…ĺiŇčatu nipatiz…ôŇč tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ tik…ônińß a zazan atu maŇčaŇčiwj ¶aaj katatuŇčusaj a bu-tuŇč saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb a katuudtu. r~…ĺikisiaj a pj…ô- ¶in u katuud nu bu-tuŇč a siŇčaŇčan, "nijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw izaw ku siŇčaŇčnaj a bu-tuŇč tur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm, ¶ajaj kasiŇčaŇčanaj a bu-tuŇč nu midad…ôm…ô ¶aj a sibanuńßaj a katar~…ĺar~…ĺan" nikamu. j…ôn "su- ¶in- ¶…ô" nisur~…ĺitan tu j…ôn izaw ku tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan izaw ku s…ôpat tusir~…ĺ ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ zazan, tusa a bataan izaw ku siwa tusir~…ĺ ku bu-tuŇč, ńßuŇčtui a zidaj ¶i ¶aŇč- ¶j…ô " ¶in-s-u- ¶…ôn-zŇč a zazan bu-tuŇč- ¶i" a nisur~…ĺitan i ¶udad, ńßuŇčti pj…ô- ¶in pur~…ĺuŇč nu zazan atu sjaŇč pakar~…ĺa tu **** tusir~…ĺ, zuma kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan paŇčaŇčan tu bu-tuŇč pakar~…ĺa tu *** a tusir~…ĺ, kańßur~…ĺaman ¶u ¶u-i-sin " ¶in-s-baŇč-sjaŇč- ¶…ô-kaw" nipasir~…ĺa ¶an i ¶udadan tu pj…ô- ¶in zazan sjaŇč mańßapinaŇč tańßkar~…ĺ ku ŇčaŇčan nu bu-tuŇč, kańßur~…ĺaman a pj…ô- ¶in zaza sjaŇč bu-tuŇč izza ku **** tusir~…ĺ, zuama kak…ôr~…ĺu ńßan paŇčaŇčan tu bu-tuŇčaj iza, ku *** tusir~…ĺ,, **** a mińß ¶aan zipun a ta*d…ômaw ¶i tow-tjan- ¶in-i i "pj…ô- ¶in ŇčaŇčan a kitizaan ¶…ô" ku nisur~…ĺitan, itawja pj…ô- ¶in pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku **** tusir~…ĺ ku bu-tuŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan tańßakar~…ĺ ku nipapur~…ĺuŇčan a niasipan pj…ô- ¶in a kitizaan izawaj a ŇčaŇčan nu zazan sjaŇč **** tusir~…ĺ, zumaaj a bu-tuŇč **** tusir~…ĺ, zazan *** tusir~…ĺ, sjaŇč *** tusir~…ĺ, zazan ** tusir~…ĺ, r~…ĺi ** tusir~…ĺ, u kananaman u nisakamu nu tad…ômaw amin bu-tuŇč, zazan sjaŇč, zazan r~…ĺi ńßamin ńßan u bu-tuŇč. **** . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == sadingsya sa nau tuluay ku bihel ku nisakaput a kazizeng, tulu ku sapisaungay u tademaw, simal, dinngki. sadingsya i Cowng-kow-talu nu tung-nan-ya a niyazu' u hina maazihay tu, u angangan sa u sapitupin tu tuud, maazih tu I tukuy, nika maedes dku pikuwan . nipasasizuma ť°ěŚěčÁĶĄśąź sadingsya ayaw iza ku cacay a bihel zikuz tusa ku bihel, Delta hank u ngangan, ayaw tusa ku bihel cacay i zikuz, mabelihah sadingsya han, taw-ci-low anca pacainul han, kasakawanan kawili tusa ku bihel tapiingan cacay ku bihelan, pangangan han tu tapiingan kazizeng anca tapiingan sidingsya, u masisilay ku bihel. hina maazihan i Cow-kow nu mitupinay a sidingsya angangan u tangah nu kazizeng atu uzip nu kazizeng anipapulungan. tangah nu kazizeng pasu sapikuwan tu paysayzaan aikecan nu lima atu, sapi buliki tu kazizeng atu cacay aenengan,uzipi nu kazizeng taneng sapitupin tu tademaw anca u tuud, hina maazihay mitadu tu cacay a sapad atu mukin anisakaputan u sapitupin tu tuudan, hakay nu mukinay anisanga' tu zuku. uni paukak cinizaan, tanengtek ku lineng nu sidingsya, nika auni paukak dada' cinizaan caay kakalamkam ku culil. hamin nu nipaukak tu sidingsya panuayawen ku tadema, i zikuz ku pipazengan, nika iza ku i nuayawenanay a sapazeng nu kazizeng, zikuzan ku tademaw nuayawan mitupinay nu sidingsya. Sidingsya izaw ku nu tademaway anicuzuh a sidingsya atu batikal a sindingsya a kasasizuma, i zuma a kakitizaan iza henay ku nu dingkiay a sindingsya, matikal atu dingkiay a sindingsya kalamkam ku culil, nika u kalihalawan tu. kanahatu i Cong-kow-talu a sindingsya angangan u sapiculu' tu tuud, nika tadenga' katuud ku kakelul saanay misumad tu sindingsya zikuz palabasuentu, katuud i tuse nu talu i 21 se-ci misulul tu basu tengtenganay a sindingsya a mapulung misiwbay tu sapitupin, Pye-cin a kamu pangangan han tu "sin-pung-ce", nika maymaw malilid ku hekal nu tukay"papisatezepen tu. uyza sa mayasuy ku aca nu pikacaw tu sindinngsya, saaca caluway, kyu iza henay ku zuma a tademaw mipili' u sindingsya tu ku saculilan, namahiza, katuud ku pasindingsiyaan lalid sa mitupin tu labang. nika, uzumaa a kakitizaan, sindingsya mahang tup ala micidekay tu mitupim tu tademaw a saculilan, patinaku Pey-cin bu-tungay a piidangan nu micukaymasay tu sindingsya, zuma a kitizaan, mahiniay Kay-bung, Ci-bu,Saw-sin misulul tu basu sindingsya mapulung misuwbay. Taywanay a sindingsya u sapitupin tu tuud. natusaay a bihel a batikal sumad han, u mapelkihay tu dada' ku micukaymasay tu sindingsya. Kahulaman tu 104 a mihcaan tu zikuz pabinawlan micukaymas tu sindingsya, zazanan iza ku nuayawan tusa ku bihel zikuz cacay ku bihel katukuh sindingsya satu. bu-tung a likisi atu ayzaay a Pye-ci maleced mabaat tu, ayzaay a Pye0-cin malumayay a tukuy u Yen-ta a tukuy u saayaway a nipatizengan, Yen-ta a tukuy pulung iza ku 11 ku panan nu tukay, labu nu tukay a panan tabakiay a zazan pala u sazazanan nu hamin nu tukay. a nngangan nu zazan macacayat malu satanayaay tu a kakitizaan a pienengan nu binawlan, aenangan a kitizaan iza ku laed a pasayzaan tu wali sati adidi'ay a zazan, uyni adidi'ay a zazan pangangan han tu bu-tung, itawya nikuepucan nu tabakiay a zazan u ahebal 24 ku culil "pakala tu 37.2 mi" adidi'ay a zazan u ahebal 12 ku cilil "pakal tu 18.6 mi" bu-tung u ahebal enem ku culil "pakala tu 9.3mi", bu-tung, adidi'ay a zazan atu tabakiay a zazan mala u mahedekay tu a Yen-ta nu tukay tu hamin nu zazan. Min-Pye-cin i Yen-ta tukay nu saayaway a nisanga' u miduducay tu wayway nu Yen-ta tukay, labu nu tukay pasu nu linnga aniatulan a bu-tung yadah ku bu-tung hatu nisupedan nu Yen-tay. nika nakay mikitay malingatu, sakay nipatizeng tu tukay balangbang satu ku kawaw, yadaah tahkal ku tikenih a zazan atu masazumaay a zazan, Min-ing-cung a zidayan malingatu nipatizeng tu hekal tikenih a zazan atu mangangiwy caay katatungusay a bu-tung sangaleb a katuudtu. likisiay a Pye-cin u katuud nu Bu-tung a singangan, "niyazu'ay a tademaw izaw ku singangnay a Bu-tung tulu a malebut enem, cayay kasinganganay a Bu-tung nu midademecay a sibanuhay a katalalan" nikamu. Yen "su-cin-ce" nisulitan tu yen izaw ku tulu a lasubu walu a bataan izaw ku sepat tusil ku lamal zazan, tusa a bataan izaw ku siwa tusil ku Bu-tung, hungtui a ziday ci Cang-cye "Cin-s-u-cen-zng a zazan Bu-tung-ci" a nisulitan i cudad, hungti Pye-cin pulung nu zazan atu syang pakala tu 1170 tusil, zuma kakelul han pangangan tu Bu-tung pakala tu 459 a tusil, kahulaman cu Cu-i-sin "Cin-s-bang-syang-ce-kaw" nipasilacan i cudadan tu Pye-cin zazan syang mahapinang tahkal ku ngangan nu Bu-tung, kahulaman a Pye-cin zaza syang Bu-tung izza ku 2076 tusil, zuama kakelu han pangangan tu Bu-tungay iza, ku 978 tusil,, 1944 a mihcaan Zipun a taxdemaw ci Tow-tyan-cin-i i "Pye-cin ngangan a kitizaan ce" ku nisulitan, itawya Pye-cin pulung iza ku 3200 tusil ku Bu-tung, 1949 a mihcaan tahakal ku nipapulungan a niasipan Pye-cin a kitizaan izaway a ngangan nu zazan syang 6074 tusil, zumaay a Bu-tung 1330 tusil, zazan 274 tusil, syang 111 tusil, zazan 85 tusil, li 71 tusil, u kananaman u nisakamu nu tademaw amin Bu-tung, zazan syang, zazan li hamin han u Bu-tung. 1949 . malalitin tu i hekalay atu natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == sadiŇčsja sa nau tur~…ĺuaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ ku nisakaput a kaziz…ôŇč, tur~…ĺu ku sapisauŇčaj u tad…ômaw, simar~…ĺ, dinŇčki. sadiŇčsja i ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu nu tuŇč-nan-ja a nijazu Ē~ ° u ńßina maazińßaj tu, u aŇčaŇčan sa u sapitupin tu tuud, maazińß tu i tukuj, nika ma…ôd…ôs dku pikuwan . nipasasizuma **** sadiŇčsja ajaw iza ku ¶a ¶aj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ zikuz tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ, d…ôr~…ĺta ńßank u ŇčaŇčan, ajaw tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj i zikuz, mab…ôr~…ĺińßańß sadiŇčsja ńßan, taw- ¶i-r~…ĺow an ¶a pa ¶ainur~…ĺ ńßan, kasakawanan kawir~…ĺi tusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ tapiiŇčan ¶a ¶aj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu tapiiŇčan kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a tapiiŇčan sidiŇčsja, u masisir~…ĺaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ. ńßina maazińßan i ¶ow-kow nu mitupinaj a sidiŇčsja aŇčaŇčan u taŇčańß tan…ôŇč sapitupin tu tad…ômaw an ¶a u tuud, ńßina maazińßaj mitadu tu ¶a ¶aj a sapad atu mukin anisakaputan u sapitupin tu tuudan, ńßakaj nu mukinaj anisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zuku. uni paukak ¶inizaan, tan…ôŇčt…ôk ku r~…ĺin…ôŇč nu sidiŇčsja, nika auni paukak dada Ē~ ° ¶inizaan ¶aaj kakar~…ĺamkam ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ńßamin nu nipaukak tu sidiŇčsja panuajaw…ôn ku tad…ôma, i zikuz ku pipaz…ôŇčan, nika iza ku i nuajaw…ônanaj a sapaz…ôŇč nu kaziz…ôŇč, zikuzan ku tad…ômaw nuajawan mitupinaj nu sidiŇčsja. sidiŇčsja izaw ku nu tad…ômawaj ani ¶uzuńß a sidiŇčsja atu batikar~…ĺ a sindiŇčsja a kasasizuma, i
